# Strawberry

## Observed Text

- Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Immediate max HP is useful before low-HP boss paths, but it does not replace current-HP healing unless the pickup also heals in the live run.
- Live run27 pickup increased both max HP and current HP by 7.
